response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:13: Identified '恋するフォーチュンクッキー' (Koisuru Fortune Cookie) by AKB48 via on-screen text. Performed search and retrieved full lyrics. 2. 03:14-04:30: Identified '初恋大戦争' (Hatsukoi Daisensou) via on-screen text. Credits: Lyrics/Composition: Medansy (TRIFRONTIER), Arrangement: Yo-SK. Searched for official lyrics but none were found due to it being likely an original/new song. 3. Compiled data for both scenes.
response.global_summary: A 3D animated video performance featuring Yuzuki Choco and Shirogane Noel performing 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie', followed by a performance featuring Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy of 'Hatsukoi Daisensou'.

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Shirogane Noel perform '恋するフォーチュンクッキー'.
scenes.song_title: 恋するフォーチュンクッキー
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あなたのことが好きなのに
私にまるで興味ない
何度目かの失恋の準備
Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!
まわりを見れば大勢の
可愛いコたちがいるんだもん
地味な花は気づいてくれない
Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!
カフェテリア流れるMusic
ぼんやり聴いていたら
知らぬ間にリズムに合わせ
つま先から動き出す
止められない今の気持ち
カモン カモン カモン カモン ベイビー
占ってよ
恋するフォーチュンクッキー!
未来は
そんな悪くないよ
Hey! Hey! Hey!
ツキを呼ぶには
笑顔を見せること
ハートのフォーチュンクッキー
運勢
今日よりもよくしよう
Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!
人生捨てたもんじゃないよね
あっと驚く奇跡が起きる
あなたとどこかで愛し合える予感
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even though I like you,
You have absolutely no interest in me.
It's my nth time preparing for heartbreak,
Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!
When I look around, there are so many
Cute girls.
A plain flower like me wouldn't get noticed.
Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!
Music playing in the cafeteria,
Listening to it absent-mindedly,
Without knowing it, I match the rhythm,
And start moving from my toes.
This feeling I can't stop,
Come on, come on, come on, come on, baby,
Predict it for me,
Love Fortune Cookie!
The future,
Isn't so bad,
Hey! Hey! Hey!
To call upon luck,
You have to show a smile,
Heart Fortune Cookie,
Let's make our fortunes,
Better than today,
Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!
Life isn't something to throw away,
An astonishing miracle will happen,
A premonition that I'll love you somewhere.

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy perform '初恋大戦争'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, Yukihana Lamy
